Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
162 
MDCD_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Total Amount Paid By Medicaid 
DESCRIPTION: The total amount paid by Medicaid or the managed care plan on this claim or adjustment at the 
header claim level. 
SHORT NAME: MDCD_PD_AMT 
LONG NAME: MDCD_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Dollar amount with two
